caption: The video appears to be a podcast recording session titled "Boss Talk 101," as indicated by the logo in the bottom right corner. A man wearing a green cap and headphones is seated at a table with a microphone in front of him, actively speaking into it. He seems engaged in a conversation or interview, gesturing with his hands as he talks. The setting looks like a casual studio within a retail space, as evidenced by the clothing racks and shelves in the background displaying various items. Another person, partially visible on the right side of the frame, stands near another microphone, possibly waiting for their turn to speak or assisting with the recording. The environment suggests a relaxed yet professional atmosphere for discussing topics related to business or personal development.
